AI Tool Reviews

Honest, hands-on reviews. We test every tool on real freelance projects so you know what's worth your money.

Alfred_ AI Chief of Staff Review 2026: Your Autonomous Executive Assistant

Hands-on review of Alfred_, the AI Chief of Staff that automates email, calendar, and task management for solopreneurs and executives.

Rating: 8.5/10 $24.99/mo

MWM AI Review 2026: Turn App Ideas into iOS Businesses in Minutes

Hands-on review of MWM AI, the platform that transforms simple prompts into native iOS app businesses with built-in monetization and distribution.

Rating: 8.5/10 $19/mo Starter

Jasper AI Review 2026: Is It Worth $49/mo for Freelancers?

Three months of testing Jasper AI on real client work. Here's our honest verdict on whether it's worth the premium price.

Rating: 8.5/10 $49/mo

Notion AI Review 2026: Best All-in-One Workspace for Solopreneurs?

Six months of daily Notion use. Here's whether the AI add-on is worth $10/mo and if Notion can really replace your entire tool stack.

Rating: 8/10 Free + $10/mo AI add-on
